turns.content: What brings you in today?
My left arm hurts bad and I'm sweating like crazy. Feels like something's real wrong.
When did this start?
It started a few hours ago. I was driving and it just hit me.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's in my left arm, kind of shooting up toward my shoulder. Feels heavy, like something's squeezing me.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No fever. Just sweating. And I feel kinda sick to my stomach too.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just ibuprofen sometimes for aches. Nothing else.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
No. I don't got any of that stuff. I'm healthy.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I ain't allergic to anything. Just tell me what's going on, doc. I'm scared.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Yeah, I took some ibuprofen a while back. Didn't help none.
Does anything make it better or worse?
No. It just stays the same no matter what I do. Can you just tell me if this is a heart attack?
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Well, I had to stop driving 'cause I couldn't focus. This ain't normal. Just tell me straight, doc.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Yeah, I smoke about a pack a day. And I drink - mostly beer, pretty much every night.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't know. My dad had some heart trouble, years back. That's it.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. This never happened before. First time feeling like this.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, it's bad — like an 8, real bad. Emotionally... I'm scared out of my mind, maybe a 10. I don't want to drop dead.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's everything. Just help me, please.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I ain't coping. I'm just sitting here sweating and hoping you can figure this out before it gets worse.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already told you—I'm not handling it. I'm just waiting for you to tell me what's wrong.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
You keep asking the same thing. I already told you—I'm not coping. Just do your job and tell me if I'm having a heart attack.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I said I ain't coping. I'm done talking about it. Can we just move on?
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Look, I'm just trying to get through this. I don't want to talk about coping, I want to know what you're gonna do about my arm and the sweating.
